cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

candidates.text:
Role: Backend engineer — Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Redis. Own APIs end-to-end.


About the team:
We build product features with a focus on reliability, collaboration, and measurable outcomes.


Context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.


Responsibilities:
- Own projects end-to-end
- Write tests and ship incrementally
- Work with stakeholders
- Improve performance and reliability


Requirements (must have):
- Python
- REST APIs
- PostgreSQL
- Docker
- Strong communication
- Collaborative engineering
- Shipping mindset


Nice to have:
- Redis
- AWS
- Async workers


Interview process:
Phone screen, technical, system design/collaboration round, and final.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

We build product features with a focus on reliability, collaboration, and measurable outcomes.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

- Improved latency by profiling and caching

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:

- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

We build product features with a focus on reliability, collaboration, and measurable outcomes.


Context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

- Write tests and ship incrementally
- Work with stakeholders
- Improve performance and reliability

- React
- TypeScript
- Accessibility
- Strong communication
- Collaborative engineering
- Shipping mindset


Nice to have:
- Next.js
- Storybook
- Playwright


Interview process:
Phone screen, technical, system design/collaboration round, and final.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

Role: Machine learning engineer — embeddings, retrieval, evaluation, PyTorch.


About the team:
We build product features with a focus on reliability, collaboration, and measurable outcomes.


Context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.


Responsibilities:
- Own projects end-to-end
- Write tests and ship incrementally
- Work with stakeholders
- Improve performance and reliability


Requirements (must have):
- Embeddings
- Retrieval
- Evaluation
- Python
- Strong communication
- Collaborative engineering
- Shipping mindset


Nice to have:
- PyTorch
- Vector search
- Batching/latency

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

- Improved latency by profiling and caching

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.

- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Platform/SRE engineer operating Kubernetes clusters and building Terraform modules.

Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, alerting, dashboards, SLOs, incident response.

CI/CD, container security basics, and runtime debugging. On-call rotations.

Cloud networking fundamentals and reliability improvements.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.
