cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data. We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic.

cases.resume_text:
Backend engineer with 6+ years in Python (FastAPI, Django) and Postgres. Built REST APIs, background workers, and internal tooling.

Operational experience: Docker, CI/CD, incident response, observability (metrics/logs/traces).

Worked with Redis caches, queues (Celery/RQ), and AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

Focus on performance, correctness, schema migrations, and pragmatic testing strategies.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.

cases.resume_text:
Frontend engineer specializing in React and TypeScript. Built component libraries and accessible UI flows.

Performance work: code-splitting, memoization, bundle analysis, image optimization.

Testing: Playwright, Jest, CI pipelines; strong collaboration with designers in Figma.

Experience with Next.js, routing, server rendering, and API integration.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental. We run experiments, measure success, and iterate. Security and privacy considerations apply to user data.

cases.resume_text:
Data engineer building ETL/ELT in Python with Airflow, dbt, and Spark. Strong SQL.

Worked with S3, warehouses (Redshift/Snowflake-like), and data modeling for analytics.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We prefer boring technology where possible, but are open to improvements backed by evidence.

Batch pipelines, incremental loads, data quality checks, and backfills.

Some streaming exposure (Kafka) and orchestration best practices.

- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks

- Improved latency by profiling and caching

cases.resume_text:
Software engineer with applied ML experience: embeddings, semantic search, retrieval evaluation, and offline/online metrics.

Built text similarity pipelines and data tooling; comfortable with Python APIs and Postgres.

Experience with model deployment constraints, batching, and latency profiling.

Pragmatic: focuses on testability, iteration speed, and monitoring.


Projects:
- Migrated legacy service safely with feature flags
- Improved latency by profiling and caching
- Wrote docs/runbooks and automated repetitive tasks


Additional context:
We coordinate across time zones and value clear written communication. The product handles high read throughput and occasional burst traffic. We care about code review quality, observability, and operational readiness. Releases are frequent and incremental.
